label: Vespera Tertius Shard Basilica
description: Vespera Tertius Shard Basilica is a shattered ecclesiastic ruin of black basalt and fused rift-glass, its broken nave split by an impact-scored transept and exposed to the ash-laden sky. Cyclopean buttresses stand half-melted into vitrified ribs, while collapsed vaulting forms jagged aisles choked with slag-dust and fallen icon-stone. The auroral bruise-light of the nightside stains the fractured mosaics and scorched altar-dais, preserving outlines in heat-glazed pigment. Electrostatic grit drifts through roofless apertures, and vox noise persists as a constant hiss within the hollowed sanctuary.
